title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.071 - Admission or representation evidence, when
text:
347.071.  Admission or representation evidence, when. — An admission or representation made by any authorized person concerning limited liability company business or affairs within the scope of his authority as conferred by sections 347.010 to 347.187 is evidence against the limited liability company.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.741) 
Effective 12-01-93
